atomic_facts.fact: The graph displays two distinct parabolic curves originating from the same point near x=5, y=2.
The blue curve is labeled 'no-spin discus' and reaches a peak height of approximately 10 units.
The yellow curve is labeled 'spinning discus' and reaches a peak height of approximately 12 units.
The yellow trajectory travels a greater horizontal distance than the blue trajectory.
The x-axis has major tick marks labeled every 10 units from 10 to 70.
The y-axis has major tick marks labeled at 0, 10, and 20.

spatial: The graph occupies the majority of the frame. The y-axis is on the far left, and the x-axis runs along the bottom. The blue curve is lower and shorter, positioned centrally. The yellow curve is higher and extends further to the right. Text labels are placed near their respective curves.

Two laptops are on the desk in front of the center and right individuals. The background consists of a large video wall displaying a cityscape.
